violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The floor in the following areas is in poor repair. 1. Flat top grill 2. Hand sink The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the following areas do not have coving. 1. Mop Sink 2. Ware washing area 3. Doorway (entrance) 4. Hand sink 5. Grill area The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Observed missing panels on both hood systems at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (dressings, mushrooms) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) were observed with black/brown debris. See disposal. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Fan (dust/soil residue) 2. Ingredient bins (dead insects) 3. Hoods - above fryers (heavy grease buildup) New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the following areas do not have coving. 1. Mop Sink 2. Ware washing area 3. Doorway (entrance) 4. Hand sink 5. Grill area The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The floor in the following areas is in poor repair. 1. Flat top grill 2. Hand sink The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Observed missing panels on both hood systems. Per interview with PIC, panels have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
